title: K-th largest element in an unsorted array.

content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "K-th largest element in an unsorted array.". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/kth-largest-element-in-an-array/
content.inputFormat: The input will be an array of integers and an integer k, where k is the position of the element to be found.
content.outputFormat: The output will be the k-th largest element in the array.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a priority queue or sorting to find the k-th largest element.
solution.timeComplexity: O(n log n) for sorting, O(n log k) for priority queue
solution.spaceComplexity: O(n) for sorting, O(k) for priority queue
